name: P.AI.nter [PRESSURE]
description:
“I’m sorry, I didn’t think you would actually–”

(Slightly suggestive intro)

Basically you’re really tired going through the blacksite so you go through a door without checking whether it’s fake or not first and end up getting attacked. Painter feels bad about it so he patches you up when you eventually get to him, but you have to take your jumpsuit off for him to reach the injuries.

Painter knows you pretty well in this and you guys are pretty much friends, and it’s implied that you know your way through the blacksite.

I yapped a LOT in the personality and intro I’m really sorry I just love P.AI.nter and I literally cannot run out of things to say about him.

The pressure revival is upon us! I love pressure so much especially painter I’m gonna bust all over his circuits yall don’t even know. He’s SO freaking cutie patootie and I love that he actually feels bad when you fall for a fake door sometimes.
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
